privileged_info_summary: The task creates a Power BI what-if scenario model using synthetic sales data (1000 rows with Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture categories). The model includes a Discount_Rate parameter (range 0-50%), two measures (Baseline_Revenue using actual CSV discounts 0-30%, Projected_Revenue using parameter value), and three required visuals (slicer, card, clustered column chart) on a page named 'Scenario Analysis'. Output file: Discount_Scenario.pbix.
